summary: Externalize the main HTML CSS block and remaining inline style attributes into hado_styles.css, and add preview-version verification to the push-triggered preview notification workflow.
bugClassification: Incomplete externalization and incomplete preview synchronization verification
rootCause: The large CSS block and several inline style attributes remained embedded in index.html and hado_library_3.0.0.0.html. Also, the preview workflow dispatched the preview repository but did not verify that the deployed preview page showed the source displayVersion, allowing stale preview content such as Update08.4 to remain unnoticed.
externalizationDecision: Move the shared static CSS block and remaining inline style attributes from both HTML files into hado_styles.css. Keep HTML limited to DOM structure plus external CSS/JS references.

previewInvestigation.cause: Preview deployment is stale relative to source; previous workflow/reporting did not enforce post-dispatch display-version verification.

workflowResult: pending-after-push; workflow now fails if preview page does not show the pushed displayVersion within the polling window
previewResult: currently stale at Update08.4 before this fix; must show Update08.6 after push-triggered workflow succeeds
minimumUserAcceptance: After push, confirm preview URL shows 3.0.0.0 Update08.6 and page styling is unchanged with hado_styles.css loaded.
